message:
chore: rustfmt + beads sync — register new test-pinning follow-ups

Two tightly-coupled housekeeping changes:

1. rustfmt-only fix in policy_effect_display_serde_tag.rs: joins a
   serde_json::from_str expression that was previously broken across two
   lines. Behaviour-preserving — line-length under the project's max width
   so the formatter prefers the single-line form.

2. .beads/issues.jsonl sync — registers four new test-pinning beads opened
   by parallel agents during this batch, plus updates to the in-progress
   beads whose code landed in the preceding commits:

   New (open / in_progress):
     - 5bqje  Pin fcp-core RegistryToken Display + serde
     - 6tred  Pin fcp-core ZoneNamespace Display + serde tag
     - df5uj  Pin fcp-core ConnectorPlanState transitions
     - okv8u  Pin fcp-core CapabilityScope serde JSON+CBOR

   Touched (status/timestamps refreshed in place):
     - 2icav  PolicyPreviewDelta Display (closed by 1ca5b2300)
     - m92z0  OperationStatus tag matrix (extended by b1c10c703)
     - v8tvx  PostureAttestation pin (created by 7682ed8ad)

JSONL net delta: 7 inserts / 3 in-place row replacements.
